mapper.select:
SELECT ap.*, type.type_name FROM approval ap INNER JOIN approval_type type ON ap.type_id = type.type_id
ap.status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval (type_id, start_date, end_date, title, content, applicant_id, approver_id, status) VALUES (#{type_id}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{title}, #{content}, #{applicant_id}, #{approver_id}, "결재대기")
